title: INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTS - 211info
text: HACIENDA COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides 5:1 matching individual development accounts to help reach a specific goal to create asset wealth. The money can be used for buying equipment for a business or as a down-payment for first-time homebuyers. 6700 NE Killingsworth Street Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Must already be a client in the Homeownership Program, earn less than 80% of Median Family Income, and provide proof of income for the past two months Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm Email (503) 961-6432 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 595-2111 Main phone (503) 961-6432 Main phone Homeownership Program Main phone (503) 961-6432 Homeownership Program Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None to apply. Qualified participants are required to save money. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of NE Killingsworth Street and NE Cully Boulevard Services: Individual Development Accounts Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - EMPRESARIOS HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SEMBRANDO SEMILLITAS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HACIENDA COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
